positive: A vibrant, minimalist celestial body composed of interconnected glowing flora and ethereal astronomical elements. Visualize bioluminescent jellyfish drifting through nebula clouds that form abstract, organic shapes. The main subject should be a stylized constellation portrait, depicted as root systems intertwining with glowing, symmetrical crystalline structures. Use a rich color palette of deep indigo, cosmic violet, electric cyan, and luminous lime green. The style should be highly detailed digital watercolor mixed with clean vector art, emphasizing strong silhouettes and high contrast. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a high-quality textile print. Isolated on a clean, dark background to maximize contrast and pop. Intricate patterns, perfect symmetry, central composition, high resolution, print-ready art.
